scope: Local QA login without OTP code

implementation.productionGuard: NODE_ENV=production blocks dev-login even if DEV_MODE_LOGIN_ENABLED is true
implementation.frontendProductionGuard: LoginPage hides Dev mode login when import.meta.env.PROD is true

tests.command: cd server && npx vitest run tests/authDevModeLogin.test.ts tests/authOtpPolicy.test.ts tests/clientPreservationRequirements.test.ts

securityChecks: Dev mode requires explicit backend flag and is disabled by default
Production environment blocks backend dev-login regardless of flag value
Frontend dev button requires VITE_DEV_MODE_LOGIN_ENABLED=true and is hidden in production builds
Inactive or missing users are rejected
Dev login updates lastLoginAt and creates the same JWT/refresh session shape as OTP login
Auth refresh interceptor does not treat /auth/dev-login 401 as a normal expired-session redirect
manualQaHowTo: Set server DEV_MODE_LOGIN_ENABLED=true in local .env; optionally set DEV_MODE_LOGIN_SECRET.
Run local server and client dev mode.
Open /login, enter an active user email, click Dev mode login, expect role-based redirect without OTP code.
Unset flags and confirm the button disappears and OTP-only flow remains.
knownLimitations: The dev-mode login bypass is intentionally not available in production.
Integrated VS Code browser/Playwright navigation against Vite dev server timed out in this environment; production preview browser smoke and source regression tests passed.
